name: Vietnam War History & Scenic Heritage Tour 8 days
duration: Places:Hanoi - Dong Hoi - Phong Nha Cave - Vinh Moc Tunnels - Hue - Da Nang
highlights: Admire Golden Bridge with giant stone hands offering stunning panoramic views
Try Ba Na Hills Cable Car ride for breathtaking views of the mountains
Explore the tranquil Jardin D’Amour with vibrant flowers and fountains
Enjoy over 70 authentic Vietnamese dishes at a local buffet restaurant

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival
itinerary.description: On Day 1, your adventure begins with a warm welcome from our tour guide at the airport. Afterward, you will be transferred to your hotel in Hanoi City for check-in. You will have time to rest and prepare for the exciting journey ahead. The check-in time at the hotel is at 14:00. However, if you prefer to settle in earlier, an early check-in option is available for an additional fee

itinerary.title: Hanoi War Tour Half Day
itinerary.description: On Day 2, you will embark on a fascinating half-day tour of Hanoi's rich history, starting with the grand Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum. This imposing marble structure houses the revered leader's tomb. You will also visit his wooden stilt house, where he lived, then head to the charming One Pillar Pagoda, built in 1049, which remains an iconic Buddhist landmark, symbolizing enlightenment and resilience. Next, we will head to the infamous "Hanoi Hilton" - the nickname for the Hoa Lo Prison. Originally built by the French in 1896 to imprison Vietnamese revolutionaries, it later housed captured American ...

itinerary.title: Dong Hoi - Phong Nha Cave - Paradise Cave
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 08:00, your driver will pick you up for a journey to Phong Nha-Ke Bang National Park, home to some of the world’s most spectacular cave systems. Travel along the Ho Chi Minh Trail, a critical supply route during the Vietnam War, which played a vital role in transporting troops and equipment between North and South Vietnam despite relentless U.S. bombings. Once there, you will go off a boat ride down the Son River toward the globally renowned Phong Nha Cave, a UNESCO World Heritage site. The scene around you will be quite enchanted as you float down the river

itinerary.title: Dong Hoi - Vinh Moc Tunnel - Hien Luong Bridge - Hue
itinerary.description:
Morning

Your day begins at 08:00 when our driver shows up to whisk you on a poignant trip to the Vinh Moc Tunnels, a remarkable underground network built by villagers between 1966 and 1967 to escape relentless U.S. bombings. Discovering the tunnels will help you to appreciate the resiliency of the local people. You will then visit the Hien Luong Bridge and Ben Hai River, the historic demarcation line between North and South Vietnam from 1954 to 1975. Perched on the bridge, you could sense the weight of past events and the hardships formerly separating this stunning nation

itinerary.title: Hue City Tour Full Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

Day 5 will start your journey in Hue between 08:00 and 08:15 when your local tour guide picks you up from your accommodation. You will appreciate the stunning views of Hue as you drive throughout the city; soon, you will be on your way to the boat station to start your adventure along the Perfume River. Your first destination will be the Thien Mu Pagoda. At 08:30, you will board a boat for a picturesque journey along the Perfume River. Offering a calm environment and rich history that will enthrall you, this seven-story pagoda is among Vietnam's most remarkable and ancient monuments

itinerary.title: Hue - Lang Co Beach - Hai Van Pass - Marble Mountain - Da Nang
itinerary.description:
Morning

You will see your tour guide in the lobby after breakfast and check out from your hotel. The journey starts with a picturesque drive to Hai Van Pass, a magnificent mountain pass spanning 21 km long. The vistas of this magnificent natural scene will wow you as you travel along National Highway 01. It is more than simply a pass; it is a massive dragon that seems to watch Da Nang's border between Thua Thien-Hue Province. You will then head to Lang Co Beach, well-known for its clean seas and soft white sand beaches

itinerary.title: Da Nang - Ba Na Hills Full Day Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 07:45-08:00, you will be picked up from your hotel in Da Nang and begin your journey to the stunning Ba Na Hills. As you make your way to the Suoi Mo Cable Car Station, you will be excited to start your adventure. The cable car ride offers you incredible panoramic views of the mountains, setting the perfect tone for the day ahead. Upon arrival at Marseille Station, you will be greeted by the world-renowned Golden Bridge. Supported by two massive stone hands, this pedestrian bridge offers breathtaking views of the surrounding hills and forests

itinerary.title: Da Nang Departure
itinerary.description: This morning, you will have breakfast at your hotel, allowing you to enjoy one last meal in Da Nang. Afterward, you will pack your luggage and take in the final moments of the city before your departure. Depending on your flight time, our driver will transfer you to the airport for your onward journey. Hotel check-out time is 12:00, if you prefer a little more time, you might be able to arrange a late check-out with a small surcharge.

included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing accommodation at hotel, except sharing cabin on train and overnight at local homestay
All transport within Vietnam (including airport pick-up and see-off), as per itinerary
All in-tour stationed local English-speaking guides.
Overnight train Hanoi - Dong Hoi (sharing cabin 4 berths with air-condition)
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per itinerary
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
